statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // empty'); [ -z "$cwd" ] && cwd=$(pwd); display_dir="${cwd/#$HOME/\~}"; git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then unstaged=""; git -C "$cwd" diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || unstaged=$(printf '\033[31m ●\033[0m'); staged=""; git -C "$cwd" diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null || staged=$(printf '\033[31m +\033[0m'); git_info=" [${branch}${unstaged}${staged}]"; fi; fi; echo "${display_dir}${git_info}"
